general_textarena_slm_policy.name: general_textarena_slm_policy
general_textarena_slm_policy.value: Follow the visible TextArena rules. Track state across observations, avoid repeating invalid actions, and output only one legal action.

hangman_slm_policy.name: hangman_slm_policy
hangman_slm_policy.value: For Hangman-v0: Guess common letters first. Return one bracketed letter unless you know the full word.

minesweeper_small_slm_policy.name: minesweeper_small_slm_policy
minesweeper_small_slm_policy.value: For Minesweeper-v0-small: Reveal safe-looking cells by row and column in brackets. Avoid repeating revealed cells.

sudoku_very_easy_slm_policy.name: sudoku_very_easy_slm_policy
sudoku_very_easy_slm_policy.value: For Sudoku-v0-very-easy: Return one legal placement in the requested coordinate/value format from the grid.

wordle_slm_policy.name: wordle_slm_policy
wordle_slm_policy.value: For Wordle-v0: Use feedback to eliminate letters. Return one lowercase 5-letter guess in brackets.
